name: F-8: Provider Parity
description: Same agent definition produces identical event-type sequences regardless of provider. The PRIMARY correctness gate for provider neutrality.

agent_def.name: parity-agent
agent_def.system: You are a helpful assistant with a search tool.

turns.text: Based on my search, the latest ADK Rust version is 0.10.0.

content.text: What is the latest version of ADK Rust?

provider_parity.note: All providers MUST produce the exact same event-type sequence. This fixture is run once per provider with the same ScriptedLlm turns — the runtime event mapping layer normalizes provider differences.
